title: Waterloo, Walloon Brabant — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Waterloo, Walloon Brabant: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Waterloo is a city in Walloon Brabant with a population of 30,000. An affluent commuter town south of Brussels, famous for the 1815 Battle of Waterloo, with excellent schools and a large expat community.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
